headline: Stocks Rally as Buyers Return After AI-Led Selloff
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is up +1.01%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.46%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +2.39%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are up +1.00%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: 3M Announces New Board Appointment
summary: 3M (NYSE: MMM) announced today the election of Jennifer W. Rumsey to 3M's Board of Directors, effective June 5, 2026. Ms. Rumsey also has been appointed as a member of the Science, Technology and Sustainability Committee of the Board.

headline: Data center boom drives UBS upgrade of Cummins, shares rise premarket
summary: Investing.com -- Shares of Cummins rose about 3% in premarket trading on Monday after UBS upgraded the engine and power systems manufacturer to "Buy" from "Neutral" and raised its price target to $850 from $565, citing stronger growth prospects in its power generation business and improving conditions in the North American truck market.

headline: Stock Index Futures Climb as Tech Stocks Rebound, U.S. Inflation Data and SpaceX IPO Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.71%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +1.40% this morning, signaling a rebound from Friday’s selloff on Wall Street as investors stepped in to buy the dip in technology stocks even as tensions in the Middle East pushed oil prices higher.
